headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on WEC Energy Group, Raises Price Target to $111
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $110 to $111.
